title: BDBV Isiro 2012: Bayesian delay distributions and stratified CFR
description: Julia/Turing reanalysis of the 2012 Isiro Bundibugyo Ebola outbreak line list (Rosello et al. 2015) following the Charniga et al. (2024) best-practice checklist. Doubly-censored LogNormal/Gamma/Weibull delay fits via CensoredDistributions.jl, model comparison via WAIC, stratified case-fatality.

creators.name: Funk, Sebastian
creators.affiliation: London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine
